one_time_description: First Nation share of Bagone'an JS Drilling Inc. income recognized under modified equity method
economic_notes: Investments in Bagone'an JS Drilling Inc. and Eshkaa Niibiish-Day Inc. accounted for using modified equity method. Also holds investments in Ontario First Nation Sovereign Wealth Limited Partnership and Ontario First Nations Asset Management GP Corp.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 1988183 Ontario Limited as fully consolidated subsidiary. Two GBEs (Bagone'an JS Drilling Inc. and Eshkaa Niibiish-Day Inc.) accounted for under modified equity method. Deferred contributions were negative in 2020 (-1,123,937) indicating more was recognized from deferred than received. Long-term debt includes both First Nation Finance Authority debt (3,828,967) and long-term debt (1,479,170). Housing expenses combined CMHC Housing (309,269) and Housing-Other (401,345). Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long-term debt (145,833) plus repayment of FNFA debt (96,043).
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
